dj_text: If Neural Network Nights was a warmup, Store Patter 4-0 is the main event. If Neural Network Nights was the main event, Store Patter 4-0 is the hangover. One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: Introducing the iBrick Pro Max Ultra — it's just a brick. But it's OUR brick.
recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
title: Store Patter 4-0
